title: lan limit modifier
description: simple mod to change the lan player limit
body:
# LAN Limit Modifier
Simple mod to allow changing the max player cap on LAN servers. 
Simply add `-Dlanlimit.value=<your new limit>` to your JVM args. Defaults to 1 more than current player count to always have space.
This mod is only required on the LAN server host, other players do not need this.
